author: John Smith
title: Final Project Submission Question
body: I am having trouble finding instructions about how to submit my final project on the portal. Does anyone know if we need to submit a PDF or the original files?

urgent.reason: The project deadline is soon and we need to submit.

author: Jane Smith
title: Confused about lecture 10
body: Could someone please give a simple example of the concepts in lecture 10?

author: Alice Smith
title: Final exam
body: The final exam is not open yet, but it is due soon. There seems to be a Canvas error.

urgent.reason: This is urgent because the exam is due soon.

author: Bob Smith
title: Anyone want to join a study group?
body: Is anyone interested in forming a study group to go over lecture 8 material? I think it would help to review together before the quiz.

author: Mary Smith
title: Question about Homework 4
body: Could someone explain what question 3 is asking for?

author: Michael Smith
title: Suggestion for discussion topics
body: I am interested in the current events related to HCI. I propose that we suggest some discussion topics.

author: Emma Smith
title: Lecture script missing
body: I noticed that the lecture script for 3.6 is missing from the Canvas page. Anyone else encountering this?

author: David Smith
title: Honorlock issues
body: I am experiencing issues connecting to Honorlock again.

author: Sophia Smith
title: Question about Homework 4
body: Can we use our own examples for question 1?

author: Jon Smith
title: Question about Surveys
body: How do we format survey results in the appendix?
